code_issues.issue: No authentication/authorization middleware - all endpoints are publicly accessible
code_issues.fix: Add JWT auth middleware to verify and validate tokens on all protected routes

code_issues.issue: No authentication/authorization middleware - file storage endpoints are publicly accessible
code_issues.fix: Add JWT auth middleware to verify user identity before allowing file operations

code_issues.issue: No authentication/authorization middleware - agent and printer registration is publicly accessible
code_issues.fix: Add API key or JWT authentication for agent registration and printer operations
Remove default value, require JWT_SECRET to be set via environment variable

code_issues.issue: Simple checksum instead of cryptographically secure hash for file integrity
code_issues.fix: Replace computeChecksum function with SHA256 from crypto/sha256

code_issues.issue: Weak key derivation function uses simple SHA256 instead of proper KDF
code_issues.fix: Replace DeriveKey with golang.org/x/crypto/argon2 or scrypt

code_issues.issue: organization_id from user input is not verified - users can join any org
code_issues.fix: Validate organization_id against invitations or require admin approval

code_issues.issue: No authorization check if user can access/modify specific job_id
code_issues.fix: Verify user's email/organization matches the job's user_email before allowing access

code_issues.issue: No authorization check if user/org owns the agent being modified
code_issues.fix: Add authorization checks to verify ownership before agent operations

code_issues.issue: No authorization check if user can access specific printer
code_issues.fix: Verify user's organization matches printer's organization_id

code_issues.issue: No authorization check if user can access specific document
code_issues.fix: Verify user_email matches document's user_email before allowing access

code_issues.issue: Error messages distinguish between 'user not found' and 'invalid credentials' enabling user enumeration
code_issues.fix: Return generic error message for both cases

code_issues.issue: Path parsing logic is fragile and doesn't handle all URL patterns correctly
code_issues.fix: Use proper router like gorilla/mux or chi instead of manual string splitting

code_issues.issue: SQL injection vulnerability in listDocuments with unsanitized query building
fmt.Sscanf used without proper validation for limit/offset
code_issues.fix: Use strconv.Atoi with proper bounds checking (1-1000)

code_issues.issue: fmt.Printf used for error logging instead of structured logger
code_issues.fix: Use proper logging library (slog, zap, or logrus)

code_issues.issue: DownloadHandler returns files without validating user permission
code_issues.fix: Add authentication and ownership check before serving files

code_issues.issue: refreshAccessToken returns false on error without distinction between network and auth errors
code_issues.fix: Return specific error types for better handling

missing_items: Organization service implementation (CRUD for orgs, user management)
Print agent implementation (Windows service for printer discovery and job execution)
Integration tests with test database setup
E2E test infrastructure and actual test implementations
blocking_issues: No authentication middleware on job, storage, and registry services - critical security vulnerability
Default JWT secret in production code
File upload/download endpoints are completely unprotected
Organization ID can be set arbitrarily during registration
No authorization to verify users can only access their own resources
fix_instructions:
1. CRITICAL: Implement authentication middleware immediately for all non-auth services
2. Create internal/shared/middleware/auth.go with JWT validation
3. Add middleware chain: logging -> recovery -> auth -> telemetry -> handler
4. Remove default JWT secret, make it required
5. Replace simple checksum with SHA256
6. Replace DeriveKey with argon2.IDKey
7. Add resource ownership checks to all handlers
8. Validate organization_id during registration against invitations table
9. Use proper SQL parameterization throughout
10. Add input validation for pagination params
11. Implement missing services or stub them properly
12. Add proper structured logging
13. Add integration test database setup
14. Create API gateway with CORS and security headers
